title: Silky Spanish Allspice Berries Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep Spanish dish featuring allspice berries in a umami-rich stir-fry that's perfect for pescatarian diets and ready to eat cold or warm.
instructions: Place allspice berries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and toss them lightly with olive oil. Roast for 10 minutes until golden brown.
Drain and rinse chickpeas, and season lightly with salt.
In a pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat. Add onion slices and cook until translucent.
Add garlic cloves and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant. Then add allspice berries to the pan.
Stir in chickpeas, red peppers, and zucchini slices. Cook for another 5 minutes allowing vegetables to soften slightly.
In a small bowl, mix lemon juice with remaining olive oil until emulsified. Pour over stir-fry just before serving.
Serve warm or at room temperature as a cold lunch option.
